name: linear-swarm
description: Ship a whole Linear project in one session by fanning out parallel worktree or Sandcastle-powered Vercel Sandbox agents, auditing with Codex + specialist reviewers, running a structural smoke, sequentially merging PRs, deploying, and verifying against live production. Gracefully enhanced by Every's compound-engineering-plugin when both are installed.

vercel_ai_gateway_key.title: Vercel AI Gateway Key
vercel_ai_gateway_key.description: Vercel AI Gateway API key for sandbox workers. Get one at https://vercel.com/ai-gateway

vercel_token.title: Vercel Token
vercel_token.description: Vercel access token for sandbox auth. Optional if VERCEL_OIDC_TOKEN is already available.

vercel_team_id.title: Vercel Team ID
vercel_team_id.description: Vercel team ID used for sandbox auth when using VERCEL_TOKEN

vercel_project_id.title: Vercel Project ID
vercel_project_id.description: Vercel project ID used for sandbox auth when using VERCEL_TOKEN

linear_api_key.title: Linear API Key
linear_api_key.description: Linear API key (for posting progress comments). Get one at https://linear.app/settings/api
